title: Master_Recycling_Guide_Part_5_Organics_And_Composting
text:
# Search Synonyms

Users may search for:

-   Compost
-   Compost bin
-   Green bin
-   Organics bin
-   Food waste
-   Food scraps
-   Kitchen scraps
-   Yard waste
-   Grass clippings
-   Leaves
-   Tree branches
-   Coffee grounds
-   Egg shells
-   Banana peel
-   Apple core

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Best Practices

-   Remove packaging before composting food.
-   Empty food scraps directly into the organics bin.
-   Keep plastic contamination out.
-   Follow local organics program rules.
-   Use home composting where appropriate.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# References

-   U.S. EPA Composting: https://www.epa.gov/recycle/composting-home
-   CalRecycle Organics: https://calrecycle.ca.gov/organics/
-   U.S. Composting Council: https://www.compostingcouncil.org/
